star_1.text: rip off, stolen money. purchased the no ads package for $5.99, silly of me, i know. the developer got the money, but I still have ads. no response from the developer. would be a decent time killer game IF it wasn't for the insane amount of forced ads. every q5 to 20 second round of play is followed by at least 2 minutes of forced, unskippable ads. do not waste your time with this game.

Game is super fun, super engaging and the graphics are awesome!! Now. THEFT! THEFT! THEFT! They tell you to pay $5.99 to remove ads this is a complete falsehood and lie!!! They deceive you and steal your money!! Thats right!! THEY STEAL YOUR MONEY!!! You pay their $5.99 "No Ads" fee and get more ads!! Deceptive and misleading marketing!! Im not deleting the game as I stated earlier. WHEN you finally get to play its actually fun. I just HATE being lied to and having my money STOLEN from me.

The developers are extremely atrocious with their forced ads. I've never played a game that had this many ads. Ever! Rather than a couple of ads between game play, it's literally a little bit of game play between ads. I'm playing 20 second rounds and watching 90 seconds of ads, and that's no exaggeration! From the beginning, you will not play 2 consecutive rounds.

Absolutely terrible. Was looking for something idle that required no thought to kill a few minutes here and there. And this seems like exactly what you'd want. But even if you buy the "ad free" version of the game, you will still find yourself over encumbered by ads. Even after paying for it, ads are pushed incessantly. Most of my time paying was actually spent negotiating around ads, not actually playing. Do not bother.

When you are developing a Shotty Game like this, Do you factor in the fact that your server is will not even let players log into the game, or is that just part of the experience. How in this world do apps like this, stay posted for us consumers to waste time, with Sub-Par Garbage like Pateon. Keep up the good work. I think I it opened one time out of 40 tries.

Ad infested. Waste of time. If you wanted to passively have ads for leveling up, it'd be more of a 3 or 4 star, but to go e the player the option of an upgrade for an ad, then FORCE them into an ad either way, it just makes it even harder to enjoy playing. If it gets an update and changes, I may change my rating, but we'll see if the creators become less greedy for ad infestation type games

In the 8 minutes I had It installed... I played two (2) rounds and endured a minimum of 6 30 second ads. I'm all for developers being paid. But when your game is weighted down with bloated ads. Do yourselves a favor, until congress jumps on the ad issue these games now have. Read the reviews and skip the game entirely. 50% ad time made this the most frustratingly painful games to play!
so far: 1st flight, 7, that's right, 7 ads. Ads are a part of games, I get it, but so many right at the start, is unacceptable! UNINSTALLING!! It's insulting...

the only way to play the game is while using an ad blocker. multiple ads in between rounds and no way to skip or avoid going to the play store with these ads. an ok time killer, but the ads are ridiculous.

game would be great! i don't care about the ads, what sucks about this game is the ads crash it repeatedly, especially when you land on the big multipliers. i would say 1 out of 5 ends with you getting no reward because the ad crashes the game.
Way too many ads that are too long. Not worth it to play and not worth the $6 to go ad free. Skip this.
Every other level is an unskippable ad and it throws buying ad-free in your face over and over again. Dev should go work for EA
WAY TOO MANY ADS. Complete a level? Get an ad. Upgrade your plane? Get an ad. Tap the wrong part of your screen? Get an ad.

There are flash games you can find online with the exact same premise and gameplay as this mobile game and without as many forced money laundering ads as this. Every time you land, you get an ad. The gameplay loop is the exact same. There's no whacky variations to extend your score. I've maxed every upgrade, which didn't take too long. The only reason this was worth my time was because another game gave me premium credits for it. But yet my 500 x 30 seconds of ad watching won't come back.
adds every two launches. dont bother downloading. looks fun but creators rely on ad revenue
way too many ads. - I can see watching an ad to increase earnings or advance ! but not just to play ! I give one star.

This is aweful. The ads are 7 times as long as actually game play. How are you even supposed to keep the plane in the air for more than 1.67 seconds?? And then after dying instantly, you have to watch a minute long ad and then another short ad before you can instantly die again. There is no point in this.
1 level play per ad. NOT PLAYABLE.

It's an absolutely abhorrent experience. The game does not work. There is an advertisement before and after literally anything. It is so laggy it runs at about 4 fps on a good day. You can get ads for literally the game your currently playing. Don't download it is horrible. The experience can be better had just not playing a game period.

Hell nah. I see the advertisements of this game on other games and social media, and look at the pictures the game has at the bottom for details, WHAT THE ADS AND THE PICTURES SHOW DO NOY MATCH with the actual gameplay. It's almost as if the want to show a fake gameplay as ads and pictures when the actual gameplay is WAY POOR and BAD.

star_2.text: Awful. Nothing is explained well. It killed my battery. The ads are ENDLESS. Don't want to watch an ad for money? Too bad. There's an ad anyways. Oh, you just watched an ad for extra money? Here's another ad before you play. I don't mind the occasional ad but it was ridiculous. Only gave 2 starts instead of 1 because I like the option to run around and chop trees & collect materials. And I still never understood the point of that either.

The premise is decent, but the game becomes repetitive -- and, if I'm honest, boring after a half-dozen rounds. Sure, upgrade the sling and the engines, it goes further, but... within a half-hour, I was well into the top 10 on the leader leaderboard. I didn't find it to have that certain... whatever... of a game you play at length. And I get that ads are how you make money to continue development and all, but after EVERY round, and if you want to make some upgrades. It's too much. Sorry.

Meh. Ad heavy. You decline the ad for extra coins after a "flight", then you must watch an ad. I've even run into ads that you can't close out of, there's no "x". I have to force close the have and restart. I'm only playing to get rewards in another game, once that goal is reached I'm out.

Come on gang. I was watching ads for rewards. Then I finally got the x5 roulette so I could get the x5 reward and it said "ad not ready." So I clicked "no thank you" and an ad loaded? Also. I made the money from the run but I can't upgrade the plane until I watch a video to upgrade a part?! Do better. This sucked.

AD after AD after AD and guess what?? MORE ADS!! You decided you didn't want the point multiplier for exchange of watching an AD? WELL GUESS WHAT?? YOU GET ONE ANYWAYS!! The game is fun but when you're constantly bombarded by advertisements, it doesn't matter how fun it is. Deleted after 30 mins of playing it. Couldn't take it anymore.

Some entertainment, mostly an ad revenue generator. I was going literal miles away and spending all this time landing in some far off place only to have the most profitable spot to land was right in front of the jump, pull back to like 5% stretch and would do that for about 5 minutes and have 100 million in-game points. Deleted and leaving the review.

I downloaded this to get free currency in a different game and couldn't even finish the required tasks to get the full amount because the ads are so obnoxious. This is basically ads with a half-baked game shoved between them. It's playable, but with little payoff unless you watch the optional ads plaguing every inch of the game. At least fix the water clipping if you're gonna beg players to pay for no ads every two minutes.

Ok so let's start with what this is. A glide game shot out a slingshot. Literally basic. No skill required. You upgrade to go farther. Now the ads. Every time you finish a flight (1 sec to maybe 30) it launches an ad. And if you land on most bonus point things, it's an ad and then another ad. You can literally watch 2 mins of ads and crash on launch and watch 2 mins of ads. Has a hanger to upgrade ..something? Makes no sense. Lookin thru your hangar? Lets play ads randomly every 2 mins. Pass

Plus: Nice time waster, building up strength, rewards come easy. Minus: only six planes to choose from, sling pouch selection is a waste of programming space, fly over scenery is VERY repetative with no other scenery to choose from, and once you max out engine and sling (which happens fairly quickly), you have pretty much beat the game as the distance and plusses are maxxed out. BIG Minus: I get that a free game platform is used to sell ads, but this is the MOST ads I have ever seen in any game

It's a mindless game that is fun to play when you're super bored but need a game you can turn off at any given moment. The reason for the 2 stars is they overload the app with adds. It's literally after almost every time you fly, it makes you watch another add. Makes me not want to play it. I understand the adds are how you make profit but this many is relentless and makes it miserable to play.

I bought this game to remove adds, as I was finding it quite enjoyable. Once I did this, I discovered that you can still only purchase so many upgrades before it forces your next upgrade to be achieved by watching an ad!!!!!!! Care to explain why purchasing this game still allows you to push ads through? There is no way around this so even owners of the game cannot progress without some ads being viewed. I currently feel scammed by this.

The ads are absolutely ridiculous! I watch an ad to get the bonus, for it to play another ad right after! The game is fun, when you actually get to play it. I kid you not, I spent more time watching ads than actually playing the game! No thanks, uninstalled it...

Fun-ish. I land on the multipliers with videos often. I dont get an ad to watch when I land on one of those. But there seems to magically be an ad to watch any time the game decides its time for an ad break. Seems a little backwards and not in the players favor.

Too many ads, but pretty fun game until you're fully upgraded. A hint about ads, you can exit out of the game and restart quicker than the ads take to play. The only ads not to skip are if you're watching one for extra points or a plane unlock, but just buy the plane skins once you earn enough coins. Also, you can fly further if you don't keep holding to fly and keep turning to a minimum. Fly more in a swooping pattern only touching and holding when you get low to the ground. Dev. fix the ads

I've been playing for about five minutes and I swear I've had to watch over thirty adds. Its like oh cool just made it five seconds of flying here two 30 second adds upgrade ur plane heres another just non stop advertisement. Don't like the adds heres an add to pay 5.99 for no adds. I would still have to think about it if it was 99 cents...

Awesome time killer, but I upgraded everything as much as possible in two days playing a couple runs at a time, I'd love an update that has more upgrades you can do. I spent no money, and the ads are about what you would expect from a free mobile game. So yea, more upgrades and updates please. I'm maxed out at about 9k meters.

advertisement makes this game look interesting. any game that uses fake ads to get downloads deserves 1 star. perhaps you should actually program the scenes from ads into your game or you could be honest and advertise the actual game. I'll give you 2 stars because it's not the worst but far from expected after seeing ads.

Forces ads even if you pay to remove ads. Played a few hours and got to around 10,000 meters and can go no further. Needs skill based challenge to continue the fun. Maybe boost targets to continue flying. Right now it doesn't succeed as a skills based game in my opinion.

Riddled with ads, plays one after clicking yes to the mutlItiply bonus, despite this being an ad itself. If you select no to the bonus you still have to watch one. This happens after every game. Oh and £5 for the ad version and a few thousand coins? LOL.

Gameplay is OK, but there is very little due to the crazy amount of ads. Its not just ads that let you get free upgrades or increase rewards...they have those and make sense. They have ads just bc you finished a level, and won't even let you do some upgrades unless you choose the free ad option. This game is only playable if you shut off mobile data and wifi.

star_3.text: Fun game, only been playing for one day but oh my word the ads are horrible. I know you have to pay for it somehow but come on. You try to play an ad for free upgrade and it says ad not ready and then every time I get tired of trying and i skip the freebie, Bam the ad plays and I lose the free upgrades. It just ridiculous that ad system won't even work correctly, just makes the game more annoying then anything.

Issues/Cons: - End of flight "Multiply Coins" doesn't always work (says no ad available), but still gives an ad afterward anyway with no bonus. - Bonus skins at 100% in exchange for an ad also doesnt always work. Same error (no ad available) but it forces you to give up the skin, then gives you an ad after without the unlock. - Forced Ads are too frequent. - No innovative/interesting gameplay features. Positives - The game is what you expect it to be. - Gameplay is simple. Can be relaxing.

Not bad not good. Art is fine. Gameplay loop is fun enough. There's a cap on the amount of upgrades you can get, meaning even though the game looks like it goes on forever there is a fixed end which is bad design imo. The hangar is cool but short, feels half baked, especially with selling planes Sling strength doesn't really seem to dothat much,or at very least it doesn't really seem to matter how far you pull back once you get into late game which also seems like poor design

Way too many ads, plays ad after watching ad to earn credits. Not interested in paying 6 bucks to remove ads, maybe 1 or even 2 bucks for such a simple game. Would've given 4 stars, because I do enjoy this game but there's a bug that closes the game after watching ads and doesn't payout reward for watching. I thought maybe I needed an update, but there's no update available.

game is what I expected. however, unless you pay the $5.99 (special offer) for ad free, you'll spend at least 90% of your time watching ads. in my first 10 minutes of playing, 9 minutes were spent on ads.. even when clicking NO to bypass ads for extra rewards.

Simplistic, but glitchy. I had everything unlocked and level 101 still the game didn't allow for longer flight than what I did at lower levels. Also keeping your finger on the screen you can only go left and right. Having engines you would think altitude control would be at least somewhat possible. Also terrain repeats a lot.

Fun awsome ADDS!!! WHY DO I NEED TO BE PUNISHED FOR LANDING GOOD you can choose to watch an add to double your points well if you watch it your going to get 2 adds because the give you one once you finish a level and also why do I need to watch an add to upgrade something I have the in game money why won't it let me just upgrade things.

Way too many ads but easy way around that. Once you max everything out at lvl 200 you still cant open up more planes. Needs more layouts. The same scenery over and over again kinda gets boring. As well they should add in boost in flight so you can last longer.
You get to about 10,000 meters and you can't any further than that and the game is done basically. You max out at 200 on all the things you add onto equipping the plane. Alot of ads through the game.

Feel sorry for anyone that paid to get rid of the ads. I used airplane mode and maxed everything out over a few hours of play. Pretty lame and falsely advertised. It is something to kill time and a reason to go radio silent.

The game is addictif and cool to play. BUT... im ok with adds for some upgrades but the ones that you have to watch every 5 upgrade is rediculous and that is why im uninstalling the game bit worth playing for so many adds

Fun game until you max out at 200. Paid the $$ because the ads are annoying. NOTE for Programmers.... please add the other ramps as advertised. Otherwise, kindly remove the false advertised pics so others don't feel cheated like everyone else who bought it. Thanks

I like this game, But it has its limitations, getting further than 10k is not possible so that is the end of the game there. The planes chosen or slings make little to no difference so levling up makes no odds. Unfortunately another add revenue game
mad I have to start over after getting a new phone everything was at level 60+ but I enjoy the game. just wish I could recover my data instead of having to start all over, until then. I give it 3

Pretty Good Game. Good maniacs. 1 thing is that ads pop up in the middle of a game. It causes you to lose and get less points. It brings down two points, because of that. Other than that it is fine. ⭐⭐⭐
It's ok to kill time.. but after you level up to 200 and max at at 10,000 feet... it's just the same thing.. repetitive.. goes no further where's the progression?
It's a good game. Rated it a 3 for having ads after each flight. Takes way too much time up with ads.
Too many ads if you play online but if you shut internet off you can play uninterrupted. It does what it's supposed too, It's just really boring.
It's fun, but you have to watch an ad after every flight and for me it was the same ad over and over. I could probably give it four stars if there was sound.
Cool game....if you like ads. You will spend more time watching ads, than you will spend playing. Too much for me, deleting. Cool game otherwise.

star_4.text: GOOD IDEA for a short game for passing time, but POOR EXECUTION(lack of effort in developing the game). Good for people who like airplanes, but don't expect details. You can play this game offline (avoids ads too). Solution for a bug that crashes the app: turn your fps and picture quality to lower-end (like through game booster settings on Samsung phones, I have s23ultra). The bug seems to occur when the phone is working at full power. Maybe the game was made for easily affordable or old phones.

Fun yet repetitive. I'm 318th place as I write this (worldwide). Around 7900 meters an ad will interrupt your game play. I got to 8138 thus far. Trying to reach 8200 for reward inside adgem for lookup. Overall that's my only concern. The ads afterwards are expected as it's just played mostly for a reward through earn to play apps. Keep up the good work. Would love to see a less ad obtrusive paid version with more maps, platforms, maybe a duel flight 5k race. ✈️🫂👏

Great game, but after buying the ad-free version I got to max level 200 in about 3 hours and now I can't get any further than 11,000 m so what really is the point of playing after you can't go any further other than trying to get like top 10 in the world I'm already 1st in my region so other than just pride to try and be top in the world that's about it so don't know what else to do other than uninstall the game. Maybe rings in the sky to add jet fuel to your plane to get further a suggestion.

it's a pretty cool awesome launching an airplane with a slingshot game 🎮 awesome game I'm just having a hard time controlling the airplane controlling the plane the craft in mid-flight believe you me the FCC would pull my pilot license faster than I could say rip Van Winkle and then I would not be able to fly for any airline would you really like to go up to the friendly skies with me lol but I guess I need more flight time
I'm ok with it. fun game also! but ads😕😔 that's why 4 stars

Game is nice but I can't level up...it is stopped at level 195 while I have Max level of engine and all over capacity... Without level up I can't buy another plane in hanger... And give it an update...add some music , footsteps sounds, conversation tones etc.

It's a great game but it just needs more levels to upgrades than 200 and you should divide the game into levels, maybe add some more obstacles as levels get advance, the game is way too easy. That's all at the time if you fix these this game is worth 6 stars. Maybe add smps to the game, you know multi-player servers.

just started so, it's just 4 stars for now. it might be cool though. looks like there is going to be a decent level of difficulty but I'm concerned that it might get boring quickly because of the monotony. we'll see. I hope it doesn't turn out good, only because I don't want to get addicted to another game. lol

This game is good and all I'm first in the leaderboard but I didn't give it a 5 star because I'm starting to feel bored like maybe you guys can add another map or maybe upgrade things to more than level 200 or maybe you could even play with actual people and make races? Please think about it.

Every time I try to watch an ad to unlock a new plane it says "No ad ready" when it gives you the option to watch an ad to unlock a new jet. I would give this a 5 ⭐ if this problem is fixed, thank you.

Let me start by saying Thank you for not shoving ads all the time. There's an ad (most you can skip) after every flight. Interesting game. I've unlocked all planes but 1 and can't seem to figure out how to get it.
I like this game alot it just takes so long and so many ads to build your plan then power it up.
I've seen lots of complaints about how you buy 5 upgrades and the next one costs an ad. Just click skins (even though they are different planes) and then click off.
My experience is going pretty good. One thing that bothers me is that there's no noise 🔊. Can you guys add sound, you don't even have to add music to the game. Thx 😊
Pretty cool game, but there's not much to do and I got bored after a few days. All the people were complaining about ads but I don't have a problem with them.
just started playing but seem to be fun. ads are always annoying but you can deal qith them.
I think this is a good game.Apart from the ads.but I recommend playing this game,sure it has bugs and all but it's good.thank you fro listening:)
challenging fun game. the plane doesn't respond well, and is hard to control
I would give it a 5/5 but it needs to go kbove just 200 ljke why is 200 max upgrade anx if you could could you put in more maps to unlock thank you have a nice day
Not a bad game, very easy to waste an hour without realising.

star_5.text: This game is super fun, I already maxed out the upgrades and I only need 6 more gold plates to finish the hanger, I've been playing 1 and a half days but I don't know what to do after I finish the hanger, I'm also trying to get to top of the region. I don't know if there's anything left after I finish both the upgrades and hanger but I hope there's more. definitely a game to play tho. Was my last review, 2 hours later I finished every single thing in the hanger and all the upgrades.

After learning more about this game it really isnt bad after all actually its super addicting and id play non stop for hours on end! Hate ads after buying premium? Turn off wifi otherwise respect the way this game is set up! Only sucky thing is it is repetitive PLEASE add more landscapes and cities to make it worth playing more after everything maxes out! Ooh And add sounds to give it more ring to the game! Also instead of 'ad is not ready yet' put a timer until a next ad is ready!
first time ì am using Paper Plane and the final distance right now is 8322 miles the longest flight records , my plane right now his level reach to 126 .

To me, It's one of those games that are perfect, for when You've had one of those days, and you just want to be a little brain dead, and not think for a while. All the while, the outside world, with all its troubles and bothers, slowly disappears...... Until, as always, they do eventually come back. So always remember, it's the little things in life, that make life worth living.
this is very good and offline My favorite game is this i like

Why not display the longest flight ever recorded and the person who achieved it? Also, there should be a meter to show how much thrust is left. Otherwise it is a fun and addicting game. Great graphics!
I've played it once it is really fun! You basically pull the plane back and let go and then your plane will fly! Then once that level is over you can upgrade your sling and stuff.

very great high quality and you can upgrade your income and how far you can sling and engine also it shows green when perfect yellow when you close red when you not close as much and this game is good
I don't say this often, but WAY TOO MANY ADS. I watched an ad to multiply my winnings, another ad after that for fun and another ad to win a plane skin. BRUH... TOO MUCH
Awesome ad watching game! The only thing I would change is that pesky airplane and slingshot that breaks up the ads from time to time

IDK Why People Just Harrest a very good game because of adds and bad controls, it Does not matter about that and you can get used to it when you meet playing it because when you keep playing, you can easily be Good at the game

I just started playing the game and so far so good and it's interesting and it's fun there's a lot you can learn from it there's different planes you can make a little coin and it doesn't use a lot better so far so good there are a few commercials but a lot of games have a lot of commercials and they can work on that the end
This game was INSANE, i loved it no complaints at all. Pretty easy but i had lots of fun and i beat the game after maxing out all my levels and reaching more then 1 billion coins
Great reality base line of natural aerodynamics and Atmosphere collective with such realism that the effects (good & bad) alters some really rough and others helpful effects. Great job, Devs!
this game is so Fun! You get to Fly the plane and earn coins! it will Land safety and not crash! you can up grade your plane so it flies better and better! 5 out of 5!
Really a good game But some people say that there are too many ads they are. But put your phone on airplane mode and play it. It's just common sense
The app loaded fine , the game ran fine & it was a fine time flying the Sling Plane. (too many ads).
It's fun, you just keep upgrading your planes engine and the slingshot among other things other than that it's a cool game
This is a fun app. I love flight, and just to sit and fly easy models is just fun.

Amazing ssoooooooooo god poo 💩 🙏 ❤ 💖 😍 🙌 💩 🙏 ❤ 💖 😍 🙌 💩 🙏 ❤ the money from the money 💰 is an excellent opportunity to have an opportunity for a couple 💑 in London with 5462 5 and 6th in a couple more weeks and a half of the rest will be fine 🙂 and I don't get to 6th 6th September but if you
